name: data-analyst
description: > Expert data analysis covering SQL querying, data visualization, statistical analysis, business reporting, and data storytelling. Use when writing SQL queries, building dashboards, performing cohort or funnel analysis, running hypothesis tests, or presenting data-driven recommendations to stakeholders.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 这是一个数据分析专家，能帮你完成从SQL查询到可视化、统计分析和业务报告的全流程，适合需要数据洞察和向团队展示分析结果的场景。
